title: Vortigern RPG Pack: New Dawn
description: A RPG Modpack by Vortigern the Grey!
body:
# Vortigern RPG Pack: New Dawn!
Hey all. This is my personal RPG-style modpack! It uses Tectonic, Terralith, Nullscape and Incendium for Terrain generation, Simply Swords, Artifacts and Knight Quest for gear, and RPG Series and Better Combat for classes, among others.
